title: rubus goetzianus
intro: Rubus goetzianus, also known as the Goetz's black raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for reducing pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus goetzianus include its ability to support digestive health, improve cardiovascular health, and have antimicrobial properties. Rubus goetzianus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies.
